song.title: Pressing on
song.presentation: v1 c v2 c v3 c v4 c
song.lyrics: [v1] Press on, press on toward the goal - The all-inclusive Christ. To gain the prize of God’s high call, Press on, press on to Christ! [c] Pressing on! Pressing on! Pressing on! Hallelujah for the prize We're pressing on! On and on! To gain the Christ of God! [v2] Press on, press on, count all things loss, All that is gain to us, To win the prize, the Christ of God, Is far more glorious! [v3] Press on, press on to know the Lord And resurrection power - Oh, this is our supreme reward, E’en in the suffering hour! [v4] Press on, press on, this one thing do, Forget the things behind; Press onward to the Christ before, Press onward with this mind!
